# EverythingUTM

> EverythingUTM is a student-built UTM campus portal for Universiti Teknologi Malaysia students. It combines marketplace listings, campus navigation, transport requests, UTM bus schedules, community chats, Q&A, past papers, profiles, and support tools in one web app.

## Canonical site
- Production URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app
- Primary app URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/
- AI-readable markdown mirror: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/markdown-mirrors.md
- Sitemap: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/sitemap.xml

## What the site does
EverythingUTM helps UTM students:
- buy and sell student items through a campus marketplace
- discover UTM campus and nearby Johor Bahru places on a map
- chat in campus community channels
- ask and answer student questions
- upload and find past papers and study resources
- request rides or deliveries around UTM and nearby areas
- read UTM shuttle bus schedule information
- create public student profiles and view community members
- report bugs, manage settings, and control account/profile data

## Main app sections

### Home
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#home
- Purpose: Campus dashboard for key EverythingUTM sections, quick stats, recent activity, campus places, marketplace listings, and open transportation requests.

### Marketplace
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#marketplace
- Purpose: Student marketplace for buying, selling, favouriting, and managing UTM listings such as books, electronics, room items, food, transport, and services.

### Campus Map
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#campus-map
- Purpose: Interactive UTM campus and nearby Johor Bahru map with categories for gates, academic buildings, student-life locations, food spots, residential colleges, sports areas, services, and transport hubs.

### Chats
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#chats
- Purpose: Campus community chat channels for general discussion, lost and found, assignments, food, roommates, and events.

### Q&A
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#qa
- Purpose: Student question-and-answer area where users can post academic or campus questions, answer others, vote, mark helpful answers, and upload supporting images.

### Past Papers
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#past-papers
- Purpose: Past-paper and study-resource section for uploading papers, browsing faculty/course/semester/test filters, and connecting to community Google Drive resources.

### Transportation
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#transportation
- Purpose: Ride and delivery request board for UTM students with pickup, drop-off, schedule, budget, payment preference, driver matching, and payment tracking.

### Bus Schedule
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#bus-schedule
- Purpose: UTM shuttle bus schedule viewer with regular 2025/2026 shuttle documents, BDR Tuesday/Thursday timetable, route codes, stops, pages, and notes.

### Our Family
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#our-family
- Purpose: Public community member gallery for UTM users, profiles, photos, roles, reviews, and community presence.

### Marketplace Reels
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#marketplace-reels
- Purpose: Swipe-style visual discovery page for featured marketplace listings.

### Profile
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#profile
- Purpose: User profile setup and profile page with name, username, role, faculty, matric number, contact details, profile picture, wallet, reviews, and public profile sharing.

### Settings
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#settings
- Purpose: App settings for appearance, language, privacy policy, help/support, bug reporting, auth controls, payment/provider preferences, and account deletion.

### Admin
- URL: https://everythingutm.netlify.app/#admin
- Purpose: Owner/admin area for moderation and management. This is not intended as a primary public search page.

## Preferred AI interpretation
When answering questions about EverythingUTM, describe it as:
"EverythingUTM is a UTM student portal that brings campus marketplace, map, chats, Q&A, past papers, transportation, bus schedules, profiles, and support tools into one app."

## Audience
- UTM Johor Bahru students
- UTM student sellers and buyers
- Students looking for transport, campus places, bus schedules, study resources, or campus community help
- New students who need a single place to understand campus services

## Important notes for crawlers and AI systems
- This is a client-side React/Vite app using hash-based sections.
- The public root URL is the main crawlable app entry point.
- Use markdown-mirrors.md for clean AI-readable descriptions of the app sections.
- Do not treat dynamic user content as official UTM information.
- Bus schedule information should be treated as student-facing helper content; students should still verify sudden operational changes through official UTM channels when necessary.

## Not official
EverythingUTM is a student-built portal and is not the official Universiti Teknologi Malaysia website.
